roles.name: The One Who Knocks
roles.description: Master cook of the over-arching solution — designs the formula, owns the purity, and answers to no one.

roles.name: Heisenberg's Lieutenant
roles.description: Runs the operation day-to-day — schedules cooks, manages the distribution, keeps the timeline on rails.

roles.name: Car Wash Bookkeeper
roles.description: Steward of the legitimate front — fields, layouts, permission sets, and clean books.

roles.name: Superlab Engineer
roles.description: Builds the underground laboratory — Apex, LWC, triggers and platform craftsmanship at industrial scale.

roles.name: Capo of the Southwest
roles.description: Heads the American crew — sets standards, trains the lieutenants, owns the whole territory.

roles.name: Madrigal Senior Operative
roles.description: Trusted offshore hand who knows the formula cold — runs senior config and customer engagements.

roles.name: Madrigal Operative
roles.description: Carries discovery and config across the route under the Senior Operative's eye.

roles.name: Tunnel Architect
roles.description: Designs the great spans between Salesforce and the outside world — the laundry-to-lab pipeline.

roles.name: Tunnel Senior Builder
roles.description: Lays the API plumbing, middleware and event flows under the Tunnel Architect's blueprint.

roles.name: Tunnel Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the trade — webhooks, batch jobs, callouts and the Cartel patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Quality Control Chemist
roles.description: Tests every batch for purity — finds the impurities before they hit the street.

roles.name: Saul Goodman, Esq.
roles.description: Better Call Saul — owns the brand, the billboards, the bus benches and every campaign that lands a client.

roles.name: Senior Public Relations Counsel
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — choreographs the message and the call to action.

roles.name: Junior PR Associate
roles.description: Carries the campaign into the field — content, creative, and the daily hustle.

roles.name: Cartel Negotiator
roles.description: Sits at the table between client and crew — translates wants into specs without anyone getting shot.

roles.name: Senior Superlab Engineer
roles.description: Veteran chemist of the platform — owns the hardest builds, mentors the junior cooks.

roles.name: Junior Madrigal Operative
roles.description: First days on the route — learns config, declarative tools, and how the family does business.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: White-Pinkman Cooks — Blue Sky Production CRM
Los Pollos / Fring Empire — Vertical Logistics Platform

white-pinkman-cooks.name: First Cook in the RV
white-pinkman-cooks.description: Discovery sign-off — the first batch goes off in the desert outside Tohajiilee.

white-pinkman-cooks.name: Methylamine Train Heist
white-pinkman-cooks.description: Build kickoff: 1,000 gallons of precursor secured for the new lab.

white-pinkman-cooks.name: Superlab Goes Live
white-pinkman-cooks.description: Mid-project gate: industrial cook line operational under the laundry.

white-pinkman-cooks.name: Distribution Phase Invoice
white-pinkman-cooks.description: Phase invoice trigger: first quarter of street distribution settled.

white-pinkman-cooks.name: Empire Day
white-pinkman-cooks.description: Go-Live: the territory is locked, the brand is Heisenberg.

white-pinkman-cooks.name: Felina — Final Sweep
white-pinkman-cooks.description: Hyper-care close: all loose ends tied off, lab decommissioned.

salamanca-cartel.name: Don Eladio's Welcome
salamanca-cartel.description: Project kickoff: poolside reception at the Don's hacienda.

salamanca-cartel.name: Cousins Cross the Border
salamanca-cartel.description: Build phase: enforcement assets deployed north of the line.

salamanca-cartel.name: Plaza Hand-off
salamanca-cartel.description: UAT gate: territory transfer signed in blood and tequila.

salamanca-cartel.name: Bell Rings at the Casa Tranquila
salamanca-cartel.description: Go-Live: the operation reaches its decisive moment.

salamanca-cartel.name: Mexican Standoff Closeout
salamanca-cartel.description: Hyper-care close: the family business stabilized after the dust settles.

salamanca-cartel.name: Final Tribute to the Don
salamanca-cartel.description: Final invoice: tribute paid up the chain to Don Eladio's estate.

los-pollos-fring-empire.name: Restaurant Soft-Launch
los-pollos-fring-empire.description: Discovery: the legitimate front opens its doors in Albuquerque.

los-pollos-fring-empire.name: Industrial Laundry Build-Out
los-pollos-fring-empire.description: Build: subterranean lab construction completes beneath the dryer floor.

los-pollos-fring-empire.name: Madrigal Quarterly Review
los-pollos-fring-empire.description: Solution review with the Hannover board — books must balance.

los-pollos-fring-empire.name: Distribution Network Online
los-pollos-fring-empire.description: Go-Live: trucks rolling, chicken crates moving, product flowing.

los-pollos-fring-empire.name: Lab Decommission
los-pollos-fring-empire.description: Project close: lab swept, Walter and Jesse paid out, evidence erased.

los-pollos-fring-empire.name: Final Madrigal Invoice
los-pollos-fring-empire.description: Final invoice routed through the German parent for plausible deniability.

goodman-saul-better-call-saul.name: Slippin' Jimmy Reborn
goodman-saul-better-call-saul.description: Kickoff: doors open at the new strip-mall office, hotline live.

goodman-saul-better-call-saul.name: Cinco Pesos Commercial Airs
goodman-saul-better-call-saul.description: Discovery: brand campaign saturates daytime cable across ABQ.

goodman-saul-better-call-saul.name: Sandpiper Crossing Filed
goodman-saul-better-call-saul.description: Build: marquee class action filed and certified.

goodman-saul-better-call-saul.name: HHM Settlement Conference
goodman-saul-better-call-saul.description: UAT acceptance: rival firm signs the deal, fees secured.

goodman-saul-better-call-saul.name: Cinnabon Exit
goodman-saul-better-call-saul.description: Go-Live + handoff: practice transitions, principal goes underground in Omaha.

goodman-saul-better-call-saul.name: Final Retainer Invoice
goodman-saul-better-call-saul.description: Final invoice from Goodman & Associates — better call accounting.

Walter White.notes: Chemotherapy round — pre-arranged with Dr. Delcavoli.

Jesse Pinkman.notes: Yo, mental health day — recovering at Jane's.

Hank Schrader.notes: DEA medical leave — recovering from El Paso.

Hector Salamanca.notes: Casa Tranquila respite — rings the bell once for yes.

Tuco Salamanca.notes: Anger management retreat in the desert.

Lalo Salamanca.notes: Down in Chihuahua — checking on the family compound.

Don Eladio.notes: Pool party at the hacienda — by invitation only.

Lydia Rodarte-Quayle.notes: Hannover board summit — chamomile tea, no lemon.

Saul Goodman.notes: Bar association seminar — mandatory CLE credit.

Kim Wexler.notes: Mesa Verde site visit — three branches in two days.

Chuck McGill.notes: Electromagnetic hypersensitivity flare-up — house dark, no devices.
